abstract: Indicates that there is no more data to decode.
overview:
## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes]. Returns [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/errSecUnknownFormat] upon detection of an improperly formatted CMS message.

## Discussion

When you call this function, the decoder finishes decoding the message. If the message was encrypted and this function returns a result code of `noErr`, the message was successfully decrypted. Call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderCopyContent(_:_:)] function to retrieve the message content. Call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderGetNumSigners(_:_:)] function to find out if the message was signed and, if so, how many signers there were.

# CMSDecoderFinalizeMessage(_:)

**Function**

Indicates that there is no more data to decode.

## Declaration

```swift
func CMSDecoderFinalizeMessage(_ cmsDecoder: CMSDecoder) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **cmsDecoder**: The CMSDecoder reference returned by the `CMSDecoderCreate` function.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes]. Returns [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/errSecUnknownFormat] upon detection of an improperly formatted CMS message.

## Discussion

When you call this function, the decoder finishes decoding the message. If the message was encrypted and this function returns a result code of `noErr`, the message was successfully decrypted. Call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderCopyContent(_:_:)] function to retrieve the message content. Call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderGetNumSigners(_:_:)] function to find out if the message was signed and, if so, how many signers there were.

## Related Documentation

- **CMSDecoderGetNumSigners(_:_:)**: Obtains the number of signers of a message.
- **CMSDecoderCreate(_:)**: Creates a CMSDecoder reference.
- **CMSDecoderCopyContent(_:_:)**: Obtains the message content, if any.
